title: Trigun Stargaze Stars Talk Future of The Franchise, Their Characters Avoiding Death (Exclusive)
content: The final episode of Trigun Stargaze is here, bringing to an end the anime sensation that offered new takes on the likes of Vash the Stampede, Meryl Strife, Milly Thompson, and Nicholas D. Wolfwood.
author: ComicBook

title: Gintama Creator’s New Anime Confirms Netflix Release Date With Trailer
content: The creator behind legendary Shonen Jump series Gintama is getting a brand new anime with Netflix later this April, and the new series has confirmed its release date with Netflix in a new trailer and poster showing it all off.
author: ComicBook

title: 9 Years Later, Major Dark Isekai Anime Returns With New Trailer for Season 2
content: Isekai fans have been waiting nearly a decade for this dark series to make its return for Season 2 , and it has finally set a Summer 2026 premiere with a cool new trailer showing it off.
author: ComicBook

title: Mushoku Tensei Season 3 Confirms Release Date With New Trailer (& Big Plans for Eris)
content: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation is finally set to make its comeback with its third season later this Summer, and a release date has been set for the new episodes with a cool new trailer showing more of it off.
author: ComicBook

title: Crunchyroll Confirms Season 2 for Winter 2026 Breakout Anime Hit (First Look Revealed)
content: The Winter 2026 anime schedule has come to an end , but Crunchyroll has confirmed that the biggest breakout hit of the season is coming back for Season 2. With the Spring 2026 anime schedule preparing to debut a whole new wave of anime, it’s time to say goodbye to all of the hits that kicked off their run earlier this…
author: ComicBook

title: Solo Leveling: Karma Drops New Trailer to Explore Its Story
content: Solo Leveling’s first two seasons quickly established the anime adaptation as one of the biggest series in the medium in recent years. While a third season has yet to officially be confirmed, many anime fans believe that it is only a matter of time before we see Jinwoo Sung return to the anime world.
author: ComicBook

title: One Piece Hypes Elbaph Arc Premiere With New Trailer (Featuring a Major New Character)
content: One Piece ‘s anime is finally coming back for new episodes this April as part of the new wave of Spring 2026 anime, and fans have gotten a cool new look at what’s coming in the Elbaph Arc with the first look at a major new addition to the cast.
author: ComicBook

title: Netflix Announces JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure: Steel Ball Run – 2nd Stage
content: We have good news and bad news, JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure fans. While Johnny Joestar and Gyro Zeppeli are confirmed to return for the “2nd Stage” of the Steel Ball Run, they won’t be returning for a weekly competition.
author: ComicBook

title: Shonen Jump Confirms an Exciting Lineup in April
content: Thanks to the success of several long-running serializations such as Dragon Ball , One Piece , Naruto , Bleach, etc., Weekly Shonen Jump became the best-selling manga magazine of all time. Launched in 1968, this iconic magazine has serialized countless incredible manga series and one-shots over the years.
author: ComicBook

title: Jujutsu Kaisen Season 4 Will Set Up The Finale With The Biggest Plot Twist Ever
content: Warning: This article contains spoilers from the Jujutsu Kaisen manga! After an exciting run in the Winter 2026 anime season, Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3 reached its conclusion with a major cliffhanger.
author: ComicBook
